items.name: A-Contactless-Thyrovitals-Monitoring-Analysis-System
items.description: A Contactless ThyroVitals Monitoring System is an AI-based healthcare solution that uses a webcam to monitor thyroid-related vital signs like heart rate, breathing rate, and fatigue without physical contact. It enables real-time, non-invasive screening, remote monitoring, and early detection support for better thyroid health management.
